title: Windows-safe npm subprocess for operator execute-safe
problem: operator_loop --mode execute-safe fails on Windows with FileNotFoundError when spawning bare argv ['npm', 'run', 'build'] because npm is a .cmd shim. verify inherits the same command list.
acceptance_criteria: safe_verification_commands uses shutil.which('npm') for public_site_build argv on Windows.
public_site_build omitted when npm is not on PATH.
execute-safe completes site build on Windows when npm is installed.
verify without --skip-site uses the same resolved npm path via safe_verification_commands.
non_goals: Do not change verify_runner subprocess capture separately.
rollback_plan: Revert operator_loop resolve_npm_executable and restore bare npm argv.
